data.title: Apocalypse Hotel
data.synopsis:
In the year 2157, Gingarou Hotel, a luxury establishment in Ginza, Tokyo, employs advanced hotelier robots to provide best-in-class hospitality. Unfortunately, no one has visited the hotel in decades, as humanity has long abandoned Earth due to its toxic atmosphere.

Yachiyo, the robot "acting acting manager," works tirelessly every day alongside her mechanical crew to keep the hotel running in tip-top shape. Over the years, many employees have ceased functioning, with no hope of repair or replacement. Still, Yachiyo continues to fulfill her duties, just as she promised the hotel's owner before his departure. She remains optimistic that humanity will one day return to Earth—and that she will see the owner again.

[Written by MAL Rewrite]

data.title: Game Center Shoujo to Ibunka Kouryuu
data.title_english: Cultural Exchange With a Game Centre Girl
data.title_japanese: ゲーセン少女と異文化交流
title_synonyms: Game Center de Shoujo to Ibunka Kouryuu Suru Hanashi
Cross-Cultural Exchange With the Girl at the Arcade
data.synopsis:
Lily Baker, a young English girl, decides to go to an arcade on Valentine's Day. She is determined to win a stuffed animal from a claw machine; but even after attempting it for hours, she is unable to get her hands on the prize. Just as she is about to give up, arcade employee Renji Kusakabe steps in and wins the prize for her as a present to celebrate the special day. Due to her cultural background, however, Lily mistakes his action as a declaration of love!

With Lily returning to the same arcade in the hopes of seeing Renji again, the two begin exchanging a notebook to learn more about each other and their respective cultures. This marks the start of a friendship filled with gaming, but that is not enough for Lily, as she swears to make Renji fall in love with her!

[Written by MAL Rewrite]
data.background: Game Center Shoujo to Ibunka Kouryuu was released on Blu-ray in two box sets from October 29, 2025, to November 26, 2025.

data.title: Crevice
data.synopsis:
A native island girl finds a man who's washed ashore. She welcomes him in their village, and the two get to know each other. Meanwhile, the man becomes fascinated with the island's magical stone.

(Source: U-NEXT, edited)
data.background: Graduate Work 2024 by Souta Fukushima, Tama Art University.

data.title: Saba Ningen
data.synopsis:
Momo, a postman, receives a letter every time she delivers a package to Sabao's house. One day, while continuing to exchange letters and packages, Momo discovers Sabao running an ice cream stand on the roadside.

(Source: U-NEXT, translated)
data.background: 3rd Year Work 2024 by Rintarou Kamikawa, Kobe Design University.

data.title: Jinling Yu Mao
data.synopsis:
In the ancient city of Jinling, General Kou's bodyguard cat, Zhan Ao, loses his will to fight and becomes a stray cat after the general's sacrifice. Soon after, several bizarre cases of humans turning into beasts occur in the city, and even the Crown Prince mysteriously disappears. Zhan Ao gets caught up in the chaos. Young Bao Zheng investigates and cares for the injured Zhan Ao. Together with Jinmaoshu and Kou Zhu, General Kou's daughter, they find the mastermind behind it all and uncover a huge conspiracy.

(Source: Bangumi, translated)

data.title: Bishoku-ke no Rule
data.synopsis: Serious and responsible, Reyna wants to financially help her single mother. She signs up for a dating app to earn extra money on paid dates. Full of worries and worries, the girl goes on a first date, where she tries to negotiate like an adult, but quickly succumbs to the promise of good money. The man turns out to be her uncle, businessman Yuma. After the conversation, he grabs the confused niece by the hand and for some reason leads her to a public toilet.
